inputs.label: Previous ATL
inputs.businessContext: Your Acute Training Load from yesterday

inputs.label: Today's TSS
inputs.businessContext: Training Stress Score for today's ride

inputs.label: Time Constant
inputs.businessContext: Number of days for ATL weighting (commonly 7)

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounded output

formulas.atlRounded: Math.round((atlPrevious + (tssToday - atlPrevious) / timeConstant) * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
